title: Daily Mail: The Great Midlife Exodus to Portugal | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Daily Mail: The Great Midlife Exodus to Portugal

Portugal continues to attract midlife UK nationals with its lower cost of living and flexible lifestyle options. In an article published in the Daily Mail , Practice Leader Olga Nechita explains that the D2 visa supports entrepreneurs and independent professionals while the D7 visa remains the primary route for retirees and passive income applicants. She adds that applicants must meet set income thresholds, maintain savings requirements and spend at least 183 days per year in Portugal to qualify for residency.
